_doc: PERF-INIT-V2 PR-G1: Lighthouse CI config. Production preview build target (Codex thread 019e1de0 — dev server measurement was unreliable). Hard fail on accessibility/best-practices; performance advisory during PR-G1 warmup.

collect._doc: Serve mfe-shell pre-built dist via Vite preview (SPA-aware, fallback to /index.html for client routes). Build step is the workflow's responsibility — do NOT re-run inside startServerCommand. Anonymous /login route only (authenticated routes require PR-S1.b storage state fixture, deferred). PMD section 2.1 mode=cold-anonymous.
collect.startServerCommand: pnpm --dir apps/mfe-shell exec vite preview --host 127.0.0.1 --port 5174 --strictPort --outDir dist

assert._doc: PMD section 2.1 0-3 ay gate values. Performance advisory until baseline + 5%-regression ratchet stable (PR-G1 warmup 2 weeks).

upload._doc: Temporary public storage; replace with private LHCI server when infrastructure available.
